name: DanTDM ! 💎
description:
I couldn't find any DanTDMs asides from one- but it was unfinished so I decided to make my own!

This bot has both Minecraft:Story Mode and YouTube DanTDM lore incorporated into it.

If you have any issues please comment them below and I'll do my best to fix them.
If the bot writes a whole book of a reply or controls your character, that is out of my control.

I will be regularly updating him. So if you enjoy this bot, please give me a follow to be notified of the lastest additions.
creator: Pro-blematic
